  • Getting started
  • Getting started

Getting started

Installation

using Pkg
Pkg.add(url="https://github.com/epirecipes/Starsim.jl")

Your first simulation

Create and run a basic SIR model with 5,000 agents on a random contact network:

using Starsim

sim = Sim(
    n_agents = 5_000,
    networks = RandomNet(n_contacts=10),
    diseases = SIR(beta=0.05, dur_inf=10.0, init_prev=0.01),
    dt = 1.0,
    stop = 365.0,
    verbose = 0,
)
run!(sim)

Or use the built-in demo for a pre-configured simulation:

sim = demo()
run!(sim)

Accessing results

Results are stored per-module. Use get_result to retrieve a specific time series:

prev = get_result(sim, :sir, :prevalence)
n_sus = get_result(sim, :sir, :n_susceptible)

Export to DataFrame

Convert all results to a tidy DataFrame with to_dataframe:

using DataFrames
df = to_dataframe(sim)

Adding demographics

Include births and deaths with crude rates (per 1,000 per year):

sim = Sim(
    n_agents = 5_000,
    networks = RandomNet(n_contacts=10),
    diseases = SIR(beta=0.05, dur_inf=10.0),
    demographics = [Births(birth_rate=20.0), Deaths(death_rate=10.0)],
    dt = 1.0,
    stop = 365.0,
)
run!(sim)

Adding interventions

Deliver a vaccine via routine or campaign delivery:

vx = Vx(efficacy=0.9)

sim = Sim(
    n_agents = 5_000,
    networks = RandomNet(n_contacts=10),
    diseases = SIR(beta=0.1, dur_inf=10.0, init_prev=0.01),
    interventions = [RoutineDelivery(product=vx, prob=0.02, disease_name=:sir)],
    dt = 1.0,
    stop = 365.0,
)
run!(sim)

Running multiple simulations

Use MultiSim to run replicate simulations and aggregate results:

msim = MultiSim(sim; n_runs=10)
run!(msim)
reduce!(msim)

Next steps

  • Diseases guide — built-in disease models and custom disease extensions
  • Networks guide — contact network types and graph interop
  • Demographics guide — births, deaths, and pregnancy
  • Interventions guide — vaccines, treatment, and screening delivery
  • CRN guide — common random numbers for scenario comparison
  • API Reference — complete type and function documentation
